ddls:
CREATE TABLE "calls" (
  "call_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each call */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the call */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the call */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the call */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic of the call */,
  "answered" TEXT /* Whether the call was answered (Y/N) */,
  "resolved" TEXT /* Whether the call was resolved (Y/N) */,
  "speed_of_answer" INTEGER /* Speed of answer in seconds */,
  "avg_talk_duration" TEXT /* Average talk duration */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Customer satisfaction rating (1-5) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the call */,
  "call_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the call (e.g., resolved, escalated, abandoned) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the agent (e.g., agent, supervisor) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the agent belongs to */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor of the agent */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the agent was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES supervisors ("supervisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., Contract related, Technical Support) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the topic (e.g., sales, technical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_centers" (
  "call_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call center */,
  "call_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the call center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the call center */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the call center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_centers_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "call_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call center */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "break_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the break */,
  "break_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the break */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_schedules_call_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_center_id") REFERENCES call_centers ("call_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_schedules_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "call_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call center */,
  "speed_of_answer" INTEGER /* Speed of answer in seconds */,
  "avg_talk_duration" TEXT /* Average talk duration */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Customer satisfaction rating (1-5) */,
  "first_call_resolution" REAL /* First call resolution rate (percentage) */,
  "average_handling_time" TEXT /* Average handling time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_center_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "call_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call center */,
  "call_volume" INTEGER /* Number of calls handled */,
  "resolution_rate" REAL /* Resolution rate (percentage) */,
  "satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Customer satisfaction rating (1-5) */,
  "average_speed_of_answer" INTEGER /* Average speed of answer in seconds */,
  "average_handling_time" TEXT /* Average handling time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, supervisor, agent) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard (e.g., agent, call center, system) */,
  "refresh_interval" INTEGER /* Refresh interval of the dashboard in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dashboard triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold, anomaly) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "trigger_value" TEXT /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_dashboard_id FOREIGN KEY ("dashboard_id") REFERENCES dashboards ("dashboard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., agent, call center, system) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., CSV, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being scheduled */,
  "schedule_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the schedule (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_schedules_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., CRM, ERP) */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log event */,
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the integration */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log event */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time of the log event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the integration (e.g., sync, fetch) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the log event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_integration_id FOREIGN KEY ("integration_id") REFERENCES integrations ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security setting */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security setting */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of security setting (e.g., password, authentication) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the security setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance setting */,
  "compliance_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance setting */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance setting (e.g., GDPR, HIPAA) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the compliance setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supervisors" (
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supervisor */,
  "supervisor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the supervisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supervisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)
